events.name: 2nd NJIT Workshop on Multimedia Intelligence (MMI 2026)
events.description: The 2nd NJIT Workshop on Multimedia Intelligence brings together researchers and practitioners in multimedia, AI, and related fields. Open to all NJIT graduate students and researchers. Registration details at gsanjit.com/mmi2026.

events.name: GSA Friday Happy Hour
events.location: Highlander Pub, Campus Center 3rd Floor, NJIT
events.description: Weekly Friday happy hour for graduate students to unwind and socialize. Drinks and refreshments served. Open to all grad students. 21+ for bar access with valid ID. Recurring every Friday throughout the semester — check GSA Instagram @njit.gsa for any schedule changes.

events.name: GSA AI Webinar Series
events.description: Recurring webinar series featuring industry and academic speakers on AI and technology topics. Past speakers include executives from Stryker and professors from GWU. Organized with partner graduate organizations. Free for all NJIT students. Check @njit.gsa for the next session date.

events.name: GSA General Assembly Meeting
events.description: Monthly General Assembly meeting of the GSA. All Department Representatives and Executive Board members meet to vote on policies, funding, and initiatives. Graduate students are welcome to attend and address the assembly. Contact gsa-pres@njit.edu for the agenda and location.

events.name: Three Minute Research Presentations (3MRP 2026)
events.description: Present your graduate research in exactly 3 minutes using one slide. Open to all NJIT graduate students. $3,000 in awards plus travel prizes. Includes an Audience Popular Vote. Organized by GSA VP Academic Affairs. Apply at gsanjit.com/3mrp.

events.name: International Student Spring Meet & Greet
events.description: Welcome event for new and returning international students hosted by the Office of Global Initiatives. Free food (first-come, first-served). Check in using the Campus Community app. Co-hosted with GSA.
events.organizer: Office of Global Initiatives with GSA

events.name: Graduate Research Day 2025
events.description: Annual event showcasing graduate student research through digital poster presentations. $3,000 in travel awards available. Lunch provided. Contact gsa-vpa@njit.edu for questions about participating.

events.name: NJIT Science Diplomacy Forum
events.description: Forum bringing together ambassadors, diplomats, and NJIT faculty to foster dialogue between science, technology, and international collaboration. Organized by GSA in partnership with OGI, CSLA, and the Office of Inclusive Excellence.
events.organizer: GSA with OGI, CSLA, Office of Inclusive Excellence
